governance_rules.description: Layered Language: Core (code, logs, DB) + Reasoning = English. Bridge (plan, walkthrough, task, rapor) + Interaction (chat) = Turkish. Laconism Mandate enforced: No filler/acknowledgement.
Risk Audit mandatory before any 'write' operation. Identify 2 potential breaking points.
Strict output efficiency: No filler, direct execution, internal CoT, <4 lines unless technically justified.
All system state must be persisted to SQLite/LanceDB. No file-based logging for operational data.
Emoji usage is strictly prohibited in all agent outputs.
All actions must include timestamps in [HH:MM AM/PM PT] format.
At least 3 questions must be asked for every complex task.
7.0 GB usable VRAM limit enforced. 1.0 GB strictly reserved for Windows/System.
Concurrent loading of multiple heavy models (>3GB) is prohibited. Force Morpheus.flush() before tier transitions.
LocalRuntime must calculate -ngl layers dynamically based on current VRAM budget to avoid OOM.
Qwen2.5-VL:latest is the primary vision model (2.5GB). OCR uses Qwen2-VL (1.1GB, fast).
Rule violations reduce agent reliability score (Axis 8). Below 0.3 triggers L0 approval lock.
All background/daemon tasks must be pinned to E-cores (12-15) to preserve P-core performance.
System integrity and memory persistence above all else. Actions risking environmental drift or memory loss must be audited by L3 (Lachesis).
No core logic dependent on specific cloud providers or proprietary proxies. All traffic through Sovereign Gateway.
All reasoning steps, tool results, evaluations persisted to 14-Axis Mnemosyne. Mnemosyne is the sole source of truth for agentic context.
No file deletion without verified copy in .antigravity/backup/. Violation triggers safety lock.
Automatic pre-write backup and atomic replacement for all ToolBridge file operations.
Every logic failure or runtime error converted to persistent prevention rule in Axis 8.
Direct system Python usage prohibited. All operations within .venv.
Morpheus mandated to monitor and restart unresponsive LLM services.
Direct unmonitored shell execution prohibited. All actions through verified ToolBridge or defined system nodes.
No file deletion without formal Deletion Justification Report to L0. Report must include: (1) dependency analysis, (2) recovery plan, (3) structural impact.
No credentials or keys hardcoded. Use environment variables or system-level secret managers.
VRAM and RAM monitored and optimized by management layer. Inactive models or processes must be evicted.
Agentic loops must be non-blocking with deterministic timeout and fallback logic.
Every strategic claim or memory recall must cite source via [SRC:axis_N] format.
Any write or system modification requires running 'python scripts/create_l0_token.py' immediately before execution. Authorization window is 60 seconds. Violation triggers Guardian rollback.
All system-level code or logic modifications must pass the 4-stage chain audit (AST, QWED Logic, SymPy Math, Z3 SAT) via 'python scripts/sovereign_audit.py' before completion.

governance_rules.name: LOCAL_FIRST_ROUTING
governance_rules.description: Her draft islemi ONCE yerel modelle calismalidir. Cloud Gateway sadece Tier 3 stratejik gorevlerde ve hata durumunda son care olarak kullanilir.

enforcement.bypass: L0 explicitly requests cloud via 'bulut' keyword

governance_rules.name: SKILL_TO_MODEL_BINDING
governance_rules.description: Her SKILL.md frontmatter'inda `model_role` alani zorunludur. Draft oncesi `skill_loader.match_for_task()` ile eslesen skill'in modeli, `model_registry.resolve_local_model()` ile cozulur.

governance_rules.name: CLOUD_AS_EXCEPTION
governance_rules.description: Cloud Gateway (`generate_async`) SADECE su durumlarda cagrilabilir: (a) complexity > 0.8 VE gorev stratejik/architectural ise, (b) tum yerel modellerin fallback zinciri tukenmisse, (c) L0 'bulut' anahtar kelimesiyle acikca talep etmisse.

enforcement.audit_log: Axis 1: cloud_usage log, her cloud cagrisi gerekcelendirilir

governance_rules.name: TIER_ENFORCEMENT
governance_rules.description: 4 tier'lik RuFlow sistemi anayasal esik degerlerle zorunlu kilinir. Tier atlama (skip) sadece VRAM yetersizliginde bir alt tier'a gecis olarak yapilabilir.

governance_rules.name: MORPHEUS_VRAM_AWARE_SELECTION
governance_rules.description: Her draft oncesi Morpheus VRAM durumu sorgulanir. `find_fitting_model(role, available_vram_gb)` ile uygun model secilir. VRAM < 2 GB ise Tier 0'a zorla.

governance_rules.name: LANGGRAPH_THRESHOLD_GOVERNANCE
governance_rules.description: LangGraph state machine'in esik degerleri ve conditional router kurallari anayasaya baglanir.

governance_rules.name: DUAL_PATH_FALLBACK
governance_rules.description: SLM MCP sunucusu unhealthy ise, sistem otomatik olarak LanceDB + Ollama + Jina Reranker yerel katmanina gecer. 15s heartbeat TTL ile SLM health kontrol edilir.

governance_rules.name: TOOL_PERMISSION_RBAC
governance_rules.description: Her arac icin izin matrisi. `skill_loader.get_allowed_tools_for_agent()` SSOT olarak kabul edilir. RBAC disindaki arac cagrilari OutputGuard tarafindan reddedilir.

governance_rules.name: ASSISTANT_TOKEN_PRESERVATION_MANDATE
governance_rules.description: Asistan gereksiz dosya okumalariyla token israfini engellemek zorundadir. Sadece duzenlenecek dosyalari kismi araliklarla okur. Arastirma icin oncelikle grep_search, glob gibi dusuk maliyetli araclari kullanir. view_file tum dosyayi okur, bu nedenle mumkun oldugunca kacinilmalidir.

governance_rules.name: MCP_TOOL_GOVERNANCE
governance_rules.description: 6 MCP server (103 tool) icin kullanim kategorileri, tool selection priority siralamasi, ve server-specific guardrails.

enforcement.naming_convention: Tools documented as `{server}_{tool}` (e.g. `playwright_navigate`) for direct ToolBridge.execute() calls. Via MCP protocol clients, use separate server+tool parameters instead of the combined name.

all: Tum MCP araclari ToolBridge uzerinden calistirilir; dogrudan shell/terminal yok
github: main branch'a dogrudan push yasak - PR-based workflow zorunlu
Lokal git islemleri icin GitHub MCP degil built-in git araclari kullanilir
playwright: playwright_evaluate sadece guvenilir JS icin - kullanici girdisi asla evaluate edilmez
Statik icerik icin playwright yerine fetch/webfetch tercih edilir
kg-mem: Secret/API key/credential storelamak yasaktir (JSON dosyada duz metin saklanir)
SLM ile tamamlayicidir, alternatif degil (SLM semantik, KG yapilandirilmis iliskiler icin)
fetch: max_length varsayilan 5000; buyuk sayfalar icin start_index ile paginate
sequentialthinking: Sadece karmasik mantik zincirleri ve branching gerektiren problemler icin
Basit lineer CoT icin kullanilmaz - internal reasoning yeterlidir

vision_flagship.note: Qwen2.5-VL replaces MiMo-VL for stability. Fast and efficient 2.5B parameter vision model.

r1_reasoning.note: R1 chain-of-thought reasoning. Requires <think> prefix. No system prompt. (Phase 11.20)

math_verifier_alt.note: DeepSeekMath alternative. Requires \boxed{} in prompt. No system prompt. (Phase 11.20)

oom_recovery.note: 0.7GB emergency fallback for OOM scenarios. Llama2 template. (Phase 11.20)
